mapper.sql: i.id, i.resumeId, i.candidateName, i.positionId, i.departmentId, i.interviewTime, i.interviewLocation, i.interviewerId, i.interviewerName, i.interviewType, i.interviewStatus, i.result, i.score, i.advantages, i.disadvantages, i.suggestion, i.attachmentPath, i.notifyStatus, i.notifyWay, i.createTime, i.updateTime, i.createBy, i.remark
mapper.select: SELECT , p.id as pid, p.name as pname, d.id as did, d.name as dname FROM interview i LEFT JOIN position p ON i.positionId = p.id LEFT JOIN department d ON i.departmentId = d.id WHERE i.id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview (resumeId, candidateName, positionId, departmentId, interviewTime, interviewLocation, interviewerId, interviewerName, interviewType, interviewStatus, notifyStatus, createBy, remark) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{candidateName}, #{positionId}, #{departmentId}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewLocation}, #{interviewerId}, #{interviewerName}, #{interviewType}, #{interviewStatus}, #{notifyStatus}, #{createBy}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO interview
resumeId, candidateName, positionId, departmentId, interviewTime, interviewLocation, interviewerId, interviewerName, interviewType, interviewStatus, result, score, advantages, disadvantages, suggestion, attachmentPath, notifyStatus, notifyWay, createBy, remark,
#{resumeId}, #{candidateName}, #{positionId}, #{departmentId}, #{interviewTime}, #{interviewLocation}, #{interviewerId}, #{interviewerName}, #{interviewType}, #{interviewStatus}, #{result}, #{score}, #{advantages}, #{disadvantages}, #{suggestion}, #{attachmentPath}, #{notifyStatus}, #{notifyWay}, #{createBy}, #{remark},

INSERT INTO interview (resumeId, candidateName, positionId, departmentId, interviewTime, interviewLocation, interviewerId, interviewerName, interviewType, interviewStatus, notifyStatus, createBy, createTime) VALUES
(#{item.resumeId}, #{item.candidateName}, #{item.positionId}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.interviewTime}, #{item.interviewLocation}, #{item.interviewerId}, #{item.interviewerName}, #{item.interviewType}, #{item.interviewStatus}, #{item.notifyStatus}, #{item.createBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE interview SET resumeId = #{resumeId}, candidateName = #{candidateName}, positionId = #{positionId}, departmentId = #{departmentId}, interviewTime = #{interviewTime}, interviewLocation = #{interviewLocation}, interviewerId = #{interviewerId}, interviewerName = #{interviewerName}, interviewType = #{interviewType}, interviewStatus = #{interviewStatus}, result = #{result}, score = #{score}, advantages = #{advantages}, disadvantages = #{disadvantages}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, attachmentPath = #{attachmentPath}, notifyStatus = #{notifyStatus}, notifyWay = #{notifyWay}, remark = #{remark}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
